name: Live Workflow Probe GPT54 Mini
outcome_goal: Prove the classic queued workflow lane can chain multiple GPT-5.4 Mini steps and write durable artifacts.

jobs.label: step1_create_json
jobs.prompt: Create the directory `artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe` if it does not exist. Then write `artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step1_summary.json` containing valid JSON with keys `workflow`, `generated_by`, `signals`, and `verdict`. Use three short signal strings about workflow operator health. Set `workflow` to `live_workflow_probe_gpt54mini` and `generated_by` to `openai/gpt-5.4-mini`. After writing the file, reply with exactly one JSON object on stdout: {"step":"step1_create_json","status":"ok","file":"artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step1_summary.json"}.

jobs.label: step2_create_markdown
jobs.prompt: Read `artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step1_summary.json`. Create `artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step2_report.md` with a short title, a markdown table listing the three signals, and a final line that states the verdict from the JSON file. After writing the file, reply with exactly one JSON object on stdout: {"step":"step2_create_markdown","status":"ok","file":"artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step2_report.md"}.

jobs.label: step3_create_brief
jobs.prompt: Read `artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step1_summary.json` and `artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step2_report.md`. Create `artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step3_brief.txt` with exactly three lines: `Workflow: ...`, `Primary artifact: ...`, and `Verdict: ...`. After writing the file, reply with exactly one JSON object on stdout: {"step":"step3_create_brief","status":"ok","file":"artifacts/workflow_runtime_probe/step3_brief.txt"}.
